steps.title: Understand

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let’s build something meaningful.
contact.description: Whether you are building a product, launching an idea, or improving an existing experience, I would love to hear about it. I am currently open to product work, frontend engineering roles, freelance projects, technical consulting, and design implementation work.
